# Blue Dream Budder — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand this website.
# Format based on the emerging llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)

## About

Blue Dream Budder is a premium all-natural tattoo aftercare brand made by Dream Tattoo Company LLC.
The flagship product is a healing balm made from natural butters and botanical oils — no harsh chemicals,
no synthetic additives. It is designed to soothe inflammation, lock in moisture, and protect new tattoos
through every stage of the healing process.

The site also offers Heal-AId, an AI-powered tattoo healing tracker that analyzes daily check-in photos
and provides personalized aftercare guidance.

## Products

- Blue Dream Budder Tattoo Aftercare Balm — natural butter + botanical oil healing balm for new and healing tattoos
- Heal-AId — AI tattoo healing tracker (photo analysis + personalized guidance, free 3-day trial with purchase)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What should I put on a fresh tattoo?
A: Apply a thin layer of fragrance-free, natural aftercare like Blue Dream Budder 2-3 times daily. Wash hands first. Use a rice-grain-sized amount — less is more.

Q: How do I use Blue Dream Budder?
A: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin 2-3 times daily. Gently massage until absorbed. Use for 2-4 weeks or until fully healed.

Q: Is Blue Dream Budder safe for sensitive skin?
A: Yes. It is made with all-natural ingredients and is gentle on sensitive skin. A patch test is recommended for those with known allergies.

Q: What makes Blue Dream Budder different from other tattoo aftercare products?
A: It combines natural butters and botanical oils without harsh chemicals. The formula reduces inflammation, provides comfort, and promotes faster healing naturally.

Q: Can I use it on old tattoos?
A: Yes. Blue Dream Budder is excellent for revitalizing older tattoos — the natural moisturizers keep colors vibrant and skin healthy.

Q: How long does tattoo healing take?
A: Surface healing: 2-3 weeks. Full deep healing of the dermis: 2-4 months. Do not judge the final result or get a touch-up before the 3-month mark.

Q: What should I avoid during tattoo healing?
A: Avoid soaking in water (pools, baths, ocean) for 8-12 weeks. Avoid direct sunlight, picking or scratching, tight clothing rubbing the tattoo, and products with fragrance or alcohol.

Q: What are the stages of tattoo healing?
A: Stage 1 (Days 1-3): inflammation and redness. Stage 2 (Days 4-7): peeling. Stage 3 (Weeks 2-3): surface closure and milky appearance. Stage 4 (Months 1-3): deep healing and ink settling.

## Content Focus

This site specializes in tattoo aftercare education and premium natural healing products.
Key topics covered: tattoo healing stages, aftercare instructions, what to avoid during healing,
infection warning signs, natural ingredients for tattoo care, and daily check-in routines.
